summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ZET Mindshare document creation app. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend UI working excellently with proper responsive design. Only minor overlay issue preventing ZETA AI chat testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts pointer events preventing ZETA send button clicks in both desktop and mobile views
ui_bugs.technical_details:
The 'Made with Emergent' badge creates an overlay that blocks click events on the ZETA send button. Playwright reports: '

Made with Emergent

from subtree intercepts pointer events'

passed_tests: Document CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
ZETA AI chat API (backend integration working)
Cloud storage mock endpoints (Google Drive, iCloud)
Login page loads with ZET logo and Google login button
Notes tab switching and quick note creation
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (14/15 major flows tested successfully)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix overlay issue: The 'Made with Emergent' badge (#emergent-badge) is blocking clicks on ZETA send button. Adjust z-index or position to prevent pointer event interception. This is preventing full testing of ZETA AI chat functionality.
